system.description: When you **_and your allies need to get out of here_**, name your escape route and roll +INT: **on a 10+**, you're gone; **_on a 7-9_**, you can stay or go, but if you go, it costs you—the GM will tell you what (or who) you leave behind or take with you.

partial.value: You can stay or go, but if you go, it costs you—the GM will tell you what (or who) you leave behind or take with you.
